description: This is a Python source code file defining the AllocationsRepository class, which manages MongoDB operations related to asset allocations and transfers. It includes methods for creating, updating, and querying allocation records.

classes.name: AllocationsRepository
classes.description: Repository class providing MongoDB operations for allocations, with methods for creating, updating, and querying allocation data.

methods.name: col(self)
methods.description: Property that returns the MongoDB collection for allocations.

methods.name: None ensure_indexes(self)
methods.description: Creates necessary indexes on the allocations collection to optimize query performance.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_id(self, allocation_id: ObjectId)
methods.description: Retrieves an allocation document by its ObjectId.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_active_by_asset(self, asset_id: ObjectId)
methods.description: Fetches the active allocation for a specific asset.

methods.name: list[dict[str,Any]] list(self, user_id: ObjectId | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)
methods.description: Returns a list of allocations, optionally filtered by user_id, with pagination.

methods.name: dict[str,Any] create_allocation( self, *, asset_id: ObjectId, to_user_id: ObjectId, notes: str | None, actor_user_id: ObjectId | None )
methods.description: Creates a new allocation record with provided asset and user information.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None mark_returned(self, allocation_id: ObjectId, notes: str | None)
methods.description: Marks an allocation as returned and updates notes.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None create_transfer_request( self, allocation_id: ObjectId, to_user_id: ObjectId, notes: str | None, requested_by: ObjectId )
methods.description: Creates a transfer request for an existing allocation.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None decide_transfer( self, allocation_id: ObjectId, decision: str, decided_by: ObjectId, notes: str | None )
methods.description: Handles the approval or rejection of a transfer request, updating records accordingly.

ctags.name: create_allocation
ctags.signature: ( self, *, asset_id: ObjectId, to_user_id: ObjectId, notes: str | None, actor_user_id: ObjectId | None )

ctags.name: create_transfer_request
ctags.signature: ( self, allocation_id: ObjectId, to_user_id: ObjectId, notes: str | None, requested_by: ObjectId )

ctags.name: decide_transfer
ctags.signature: ( self, allocation_id: ObjectId, decision: str, decided_by: ObjectId, notes: str | None )

ctags.name: get_active_by_asset
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_active_by_asset(self, asset_id: ObjectId) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: get_by_id
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_id(self, allocation_id: ObjectId) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: list
ctags.pattern: /^    async def list(self, user_id: ObjectId | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0) -> /
ctags.signature: (self, user_id: ObjectId | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)

ctags.name: mark_returned
ctags.pattern: /^    async def mark_returned(self, allocation_id: ObjectId, notes: str | None) -> dict[str, Any] /
